description: Autonomy: (1) on SessionStart, inject autonomous-mode guidance via session-start-context.sh; the variant picked depends on $CLAUDE_AUTO_QUESTIONS_OK (=1 allows AskUserQuestion, anything else discourages all questions). (2) on PreToolUse for AskUserQuestion, run handle-ask-question.sh which denies the call with a stock 'use your best judgement' message when $CLAUDE_AUTO_QUESTIONS_OK is not 1. (3) on Stop, run handle-stop.py which inspects the last assistant message: if it equals 'done', send /exit to the tmux pane; otherwise nudge claude to confirm completion by replying with 'done'. (4) on StopFailure, run handle-stop-failure.sh which counts consecutive turn failures in $TMPDIR/<session-id>: up to 5 it re-submits the previous prompt via Up+Enter, then exits.
